title: CastCrafter CA13 Mische
description: Modpack with all mods, resourcepacks and shader/shader settings used by CastCrafter in CraftAttack 13
body: ![CraftAttack 13 Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d49fad422548a113bda0b311b2b6008a29d2748.png) #### Description This modpack includes all the mods, resource packs, shaders and shader settings that Castcrafter uses for CraftAttack (and some extra) and some Datapacks to replicate Craft Attack functionality (a Custom Enchantment to make Happy Ghasts Faster for example)! If you want to use this modpack in singleplayer, you shouldn't need to worry about anything. However, if you want to play on servers with it, make sure that the server you're playing on allows mods such as Litematica, Freecam and Clientsort. I am not responsible if you get banned for using these mods. #### Infos Castcrafter uses Bobby + Nvidium, but this modpack only includes Distant Horizons, Voxy and Bobby per Default. I recommend experimenting with different combinations of mods to see what works best on your machine. DH and Bobby are activated by default. If you want to try Voxy instead, you have to deactivate DH by going into Settings, pressing the colourful button next to the FOV slider, and setting "Enable Rendering" to false. Then go into Video Settings, where you should find a Voxy tab. Click on "Enable Voxy" so that the square on the right is filled. If you want to use Nvidium you have to go to this Github Repo and download the newest version by yourself: https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium/releases [DE] - **Falls du das Modpack auf dem Castcrafter Community Server benutzen möchtest, würde ich stark davon abraten und dir stattdessen empfehlen, das offizielle Server Modpack zu benutzen:** https://modrinth.com/modpack/castcrafter-survival-server [ENG] - If you want to use this modpack on the Castcrafter community server, I would highly recommend against it and instead recommend u to use the official community server modpack: https://modrinth.com/modpack/castcrafter-survival-server #### Datapack Infos: - Wind Boost Enchantment > This Datapack adds a Custom Enchantment for the Harness that Makes Happy Ghasts Faster > > If you are playing on a server, you will need to add the datapack yourself or ask the server admin to do so. [https://modrinth.com/datapack/wind_boost_enchant](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wind_boost_enchant/versions?l=datapack) > > Once you have added the Datapack, you will need to restart the server or world (a simple /reload wont do it!). After that, you need to either craft a new harness or recolour an existing one so that you can enchant it at an Enchanting Table! - Craftable Light Blocks > Surround any light source (torch, glowstone, shroomlight, etc) with any colour of glass panes in a crafting table. You should then get a level 15 light block. When you put this light block inside a stone cutter, you can select any light level from 0 to 15. Not (Yet) included by Default: - Mini Blocks > Craft Attack uses the "Mini Blocks" datapack from Vanilla Tweaks, but I would recommend this one: https://modrinth.com/datapack/mini-blocks-datapack, as it has more Mini Block variants and extra features, such as appropriate block sounds when placing a Mini Block on top of a Noteblock. ### How to Install #### Modrinth App: #### Norisk Client: ---- ## Modpack/Mod Support: **If you have any questions about the modpack or specific mods/resourcepacks/shader, please contact me via Discord!! _Dont ask about support in Castcrafters Chat or Discord!_ ↓** [![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-singular_46h.png)](https://discord.com/users/570869095302692864) --- ⚠️ > **Flashback seems to be incompatible with ViaFabricPlus. If you want to use Flashback in single player, you can simply delete or deactivate ViaFabricPlus.** > > **If you want to play on a server that uses an older version of Minecraft and doesnt have the ViaVersion Plugin, you will either need to downgrade the modpack yourself or give up on Flashback.** ⚠️ --- **CastCrafter Socials:** [![twitch-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/twitch-singular_64h.png)](https://twitch.tv/Castcrafter) [![youtube-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/youtube-singular_64h.png)](https://youtube.com/@CastCrafter) [](https://discord.gg/castcrafter) **Craft Attack Infos:** [ ![website](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/documentation/website_64h.png)](https://craft-attack.info/staffeln/craft-attack-13) **Credits:** Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
